---
title: "The Drivers of Resemblance in Presidential Regimes: explaining the conversion of pre-electoral coalitions into coalition cabinets"
date: 2026-01-01
author:
  - name: Lucas Couto
    url: https://lucascoutoz.netlify.app/
    orcid: 0000-0003-3278-499X
    affiliation: Aarhus University
categories:
  - Coalitional Presidentialism
  - Government Formation
  - Latin America
  - Pre-Electoral Coalitions
  - Presidentialism 
  - QCA
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>L. Couto</strong>. "The Drivers of Resemblance in Presidential Regimes: explaining the conversion of pre-electoral coalitions into coalition cabinets." Forthcoming in <em>European Political Science Review</em>.
  links:
    - icon: fa-solid fa-file-pdf
      name: Published Version
      #url: https://doi.org/10.1017/lap.2024.30
    - icon: fa-solid fa-file
      name: Preprint
      url: couto2026.pdf
    - icon: fa-solid fa-file-code
      name: Replication Materials
      url: https://dataverse.harvard.edu/dataset.xhtml?persistentId=doi:10.7910/DVN/YL2TGH
---
